items.title: Renoir, Cézanne and Matisse paintings stolen in Italian job
items.dek: The paintings were taken from a museum in Parma by four masked men in the middle of the night, police say.
items.body: The paintings were taken from a museum in Parma by four masked men in the middle of the night, police say.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Border czar says ICE may not leave airports once TSA officers are paid
